title: Kangana Ranaut Stuns Journalist with 'Weirdo' Remark After Vir Das Dismisses 'Kissing Scene' Rumor, Breaks Internet with Viral Feud
excerpt: Bollywood actress Kangana Ranaut has sparked a heated controversy by calling a journalist a 'weirdo' after comedian Vir Das dismissed rumors of a kissing scene between them. The incident has gone viral, with fans and experts weighing in on the matter. Kangana's statement has been met with mixed reactions, ranging from support to criticism. As the feud continues to unfold, one thing is certain - the drama has left the entertainment industry buzzing. With her unapologetic attitude, Kangana has once again proved that she is a force to be reckoned with. But will this feud have any lasting impact on her career? Only time will tell.
content:
Introduction to the Feud

Kangana Ranaut, known for her outspoken and unapologetic nature, has been embroiled in a heated controversy with a journalist. The feud began when rumors of a kissing scene between Kangana and comedian Vir Das surfaced. However, Vir Das was quick to dismiss the rumors, stating that they were completely baseless. Despite this, Kangana took to social media to express her frustration with the journalist, calling them a 'weirdo' for spreading false rumors.

'I am tired of these baseless rumors and false stories. It's time to call out these weirdos who think they can spread anything and get away with it,' Kangana said in a statement.

The Kissing Scene Rumor

The rumor in question claimed that Kangana and Vir Das had shared a kissing scene in an upcoming project. However, Vir Das was quick to deny the rumor, stating that it was completely false and had no basis in reality. 'I don't know where these rumors are coming from, but they are completely untrue. I have never shared a kissing scene with Kangana or anyone else for that matter,' Vir Das said in an interview.

Despite Vir Das's denial, the rumor continued to spread, with many fans and followers believing it to be true. This led to a backlash against Kangana, with many criticizing her for her alleged behavior.

Kangana's Response

Kangana, known for her fiery personality, was quick to respond to the criticism. She took to social media to express her frustration with the journalist and the rumor, calling them out for spreading false information. 'I am not going to tolerate this nonsense anymore. It's time to stand up for myself and my reputation,' Kangana said in a statement.

Her response was met with mixed reactions, with some fans and followers supporting her and others criticizing her for her behavior. However, one thing is certain - Kangana's response has sparked a heated debate about the spread of false information and the impact it can have on individuals and their reputations.

Fan Reactions

Fans and followers have been weighing in on the controversy, with many expressing their support for Kangana. 'I believe Kangana and think she has every right to stand up for herself,' said one fan. 'I don't think she should have called the journalist a weirdo, but I understand why she did it,' said another.

However, not all fans are supporting Kangana, with some criticizing her for her behavior. 'I think Kangana overreacted and should have just ignored the rumor,' said one fan. 'I don't think she should have called the journalist a weirdo, it was unprofessional,' said another.

Industry Expert Opinions

Industry experts have also been weighing in on the controversy, with many expressing their opinions on the matter. 'I think Kangana has every right to stand up for herself, but she should have done it in a more professional manner,' said one expert. 'The spread of false information is a serious issue and needs to be addressed,' said another.

'Kangana's response has sparked a necessary debate about the impact of false information on individuals and their reputations. It's time for the industry to take a stand and address this issue,' said a prominent film critic.

Conclusion

In conclusion, the feud between Kangana Ranaut and the journalist has sparked a heated controversy and debate about the spread of false information. While Kangana's response has been met with mixed reactions, one thing is certain - the drama has left the entertainment industry buzzing. As the feud continues to unfold, it will be interesting to see how it affects Kangana's career and the industry as a whole.

With her unapologetic attitude and fiery personality, Kangana has once again proved that she is a force to be reckoned with. But will this feud have any lasting impact on her career? Only time will tell. One thing is certain, however - the entertainment industry will be watching with bated breath to see what happens next.
metaDescription: Kangana Ranaut calls journalist a 'weirdo' after Vir Das dismisses 'kissing scene' rumor, sparking controversy and debate in the entertainment industry
